productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Spring Red Flip Flops
description: The Spring flip flop from adidas features dandelions on its footbed, and is created for the whimsical at heart. Pait it with your favourite T-shirt and washed denims Upper Textured rubber straps in a thong style, with rubber toe separator and adidas 3-Stripes PU footbed for cushioned comfort Printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with geametrical lugs for maximum traction flip flops care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
